description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a boxy, utilitarian design, reminiscent of the iconic MAC-10. The body is predominantly matte black, with a rectangular receiver and a prominent detachable magazine extending downward. The rear features a folding wire stock, which is currently in the folded position along the top of the weapon. The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front of the receiver. Iron sights are present, with a simple notch at the rear and a post at the front. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic or polymer components likely used for the grip and magazine.
description: A compact, boxy black submachine gun with a folding wire stock, short barrel, and detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, front sight post, and the width of the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the folded wire stock, rectangular receiver, and protruding magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear sight notch and the alignment of the folded stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port and the overall compactness of the weapon.
